CommunityApplications.Profile:
Immich Album Sync — one-way album sync between two Immich servers, with a responsive web UI.
Built for users who run a private Immich server (full library) alongside a public or family-facing Immich server (curated albums only). Configure sync jobs, schedules, and API keys entirely through the browser. Supports Apple Live Photos, preserves originals/EXIF/GPS, uses immich-go for duplicate detection, and only transfers assets the destination does not already have.
Support is provided through the GitHub issues tracker.
